Idioma.Relacion_Aplicada: The relationn of payroll already was applied previously, desires to apply it again?
Idioma.LB_El_siguiente_campo_debe_ser_mayor_que: The following field should be greater that zero.
Idioma.Error_Misma_Empresa: You are working with the origin company to do movements of incidents among businesses (Integral Solutions). It cannot carry out movements to her same.
